PowerShell(claude mcp add --transport stdio matlab -- "D:\\MATLAB\\matlab-mcp-core-server-win64.exe" --matlab-root=D:\\MATLAB\\R2022a --initial-working-folder="d:\\MATLAB\\MATLAB WORKSPACE" --matlab-display-mode=nodesktop --initialize-matlab-on-startup=true 2>&1)

PowerShell($tempFile = [System.IO.Path]::GetTempFileName\(\); $request = '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"detect_matlab_toolboxes","arguments":{}}}'; $utf8 = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($tempFile, $utf8.GetBytes\($request\)\); $result = cmd /c "type `"$tempFile`" 2>$null | `"D:\\MATLAB\\matlab-mcp-core-server-win64.exe`" --matlab-root=D:\\MATLAB\\R2022a --log-level=error 2>&1"; Remove-Item $tempFile; Write-Output $result)

PowerShell($tempFile = [System.IO.Path]::GetTempFileName\(\); $request = '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"detect_matlab_toolboxes","arguments":{}}}'; $utf8 = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($tempFile, $utf8.GetBytes\($request\)\); $batFile = [System.IO.Path]::GetTempFileName\(\) -replace '\\.tmp', '.bat'; $batContent = "@echo off`r`n`"D:\\MATLAB\\matlab-mcp-core-server-win64.exe`" --matlab-root=D:\\MATLAB\\R2022a --log-level=error < `"$tempFile`" 2>&1"; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($batFile, $utf8.GetBytes\($batContent\)\); $result = cmd /c $batFile 2>&1; Remove-Item $tempFile -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item $batFile -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output $result)

PowerShell($request = '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"detect_matlab_toolboxes","arguments":{}}}'; $utf8 = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false; $bytes = $utf8.GetBytes\($request\); Write-Output "First 10 bytes: $\($bytes[0..9] -join ', '\)"; Write-Output "Expected \(no BOM\): 123, 34, 106, 115, 111, 110, 114, 112, 99, 34"; Write-Output "Actual char: $\([char[]]$bytes[0..9] -join ''\)")

PowerShell($tempIn = "C:\\Users\\Userx\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\mcp_stdin.txt"; $tempOut = "C:\\Users\\Userx\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\mcp_stdout.txt"; $init = '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"claude-code","version":"2.1.129"}}}'; $toolsList = '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/list","params":{}}'; $toolCall = '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":3,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"detect_matlab_toolboxes","arguments":{}}}'; $all = "$init`n$toolsList`n$toolCall`n"; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($tempIn, $all, \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false\)\); Write-Output "Input written \(UTF-8, no BOM\):"; Write-Output $all)

PowerShell($tempIn = "C:\\Users\\Userx\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\mcp_stdin.txt"; $tempOut = "C:\\Users\\Userx\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\mcp_stdout.txt"; $tempErr = "C:\\Users\\Userx\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\mcp_stderr.txt"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "D:\\MATLAB\\matlab-mcp-core-server-win64.exe" -ArgumentList "--matlab-root=D:\\MATLAB\\R2022a --log-level=debug" -RedirectStandardInput $tempIn -RedirectStandardOutput $tempOut -RedirectStandardError $tempErr -NoNewWindow -Wait -PassThru; Write-Output "Exit code: $\($p.ExitCode\)"; Write-Output "=== STDOUT ==="; Get-Content $tempOut; Write-Output "=== STDERR ==="; Get-Content $tempErr)

PowerShell(& "D:\\MATLAB\\R2022a\\bin\\matlab.exe" -nodesktop -nosplash -batch "v = ver; disp\('=== Installed Toolboxes ==='\); for i=1:length\(v\), fprintf\('%s \(v%s\)\\n', v\(i\).Name, v\(i\).Version\); end" 2>&1)

PowerShell(& "D:\\MATLAB\\R2022a\\bin\\matlab.exe" -batch "bdclose\('all'\); load_system\('simulink'\); bp = get_param\('simulink/Sources/Band-Limited White Noise', 'ObjectParameters'\); fns = fieldnames\(bp\); for i=1:length\(fns\); n=fns{i}; if contains\(lower\(n\),'noise'\)||contains\(lower\(n\),'cov'\)||contains\(lower\(n\),'power'\); fprintf\('%s\\n',n\); end; end; bdclose\('all'\);" 2>&1)

PowerShell(& "D:\\MATLAB\\R2022a\\bin\\matlab.exe" -batch "bdclose\('all'\); load_system\('simulink'\); bp = get_param\('simulink/Sources/Band-Limited White Noise', 'ObjectParameters'\); fns = fieldnames\(bp\); for i=1:length\(fns\); fprintf\('%s  [type=%s]\\n', fns{i}, bp.\(fns{i}\).Type\); end; bdclose\('all'\);" 2>&1)

PowerShell(& "D:\\MATLAB\\R2022a\\bin\\matlab.exe" -batch "bdclose\('all'\); new_system\('_tmp'\); add_block\('simulink/User-Defined Functions/MATLAB Function', '_tmp/MF'\); bp = get_param\('_tmp/MF', 'ObjectParameters'\); fns = fieldnames\(bp\); for i=1:length\(fns\); n=fns{i}; if contains\(lower\(n\),'sample'\)||contains\(lower\(n\),'time'\)||contains\(lower\(n\),'ts'\); fprintf\('%s\\n',n\); end; end; bdclose\('all'\);" 2>&1)
